title: Daily exchange rates
summary: Bank of Canada publishes daily average exchange rates for 24 currencies against the Canadian dollar, covering the period 2026-03-25 through 2026-03-31. The page provides raw rate data only without any analysis, commentary, or macro catalyst discussion.
key_points: Daily exchange rates published for 24 currencies including USD, EUR, GBP, JPY, CNY, and others
Rates expressed as 1 unit of foreign currency converted to Canadian dollars
Data covers 5 business days: March 25, 26, 27, 30, and 31, 2026
EUR/CAD ranged from 1.5964 to 1.6072 over the same period
No commentary, analysis, or macro interpretation provided on this page
why_it_matters: This page is a raw data feed providing daily exchange rate snapshots. It does not constitute a macro catalyst event, market commentary, or analytical content. It has no direct relevance for macro catalyst research without accompanying analysis.
